items.title_en: Meta tanks 10%, Alphabet climbs 5% as each company raises capex spend
items.title_zh: 随着各公司增加资本支出，Meta 下跌 10%，Alphabet 上涨 5%
items.desc_en: Both Alphabet and Meta said they expect their capex to continue growing this year, but investors sent Alphabet's shares up, while Meta's stock slid.
items.desc_zh: Alphabet 和 Meta 均表示，预计今年资本支出将继续增长，但投资者推高 Alphabet 股价，而 Meta 股价下跌。

items.title_en: OpenAI trial live updates: Musk takes the stand again after heated cross-examination
items.title_zh: OpenAI 审判现场更新：马斯克在激烈的质证后再次出庭
items.desc_en: Elon Musk sued OpenAI, Sam Altman and Greg Brockman in 2024, claiming they reneged on their promise to keep the artificial intelligence lab a nonprofit.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 于 2024 年起诉 OpenAI、山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 和格雷格·布罗克曼 (Greg Brockman)，声称他们违背了让人工智能实验室保持非营利性的承诺。

items.title_en: Live Updates: Iran war pushes oil prices to 4-year high as Hegseth set to face fresh round of questioning - CBS News

items.title_en: Treasury Department announces new Series I bond rate of 4.26% for the next six months
items.title_zh: 财政部宣布未来六个月新的 I 系列债券利率为 4.26%
items.desc_en: The U.S. Department of the Treasury has announced new Series I bond rates through October 2026.
items.desc_zh: 美国财政部宣布了截至 2026 年 10 月的新 I 系列债券利率。

items.title_en: Steve Eisman likes the market overall here, but he's short this software stock
items.title_zh: 史蒂夫·艾斯曼（Steve Eisman）看好这里的整体市场，但他做空了这只软件股票
items.desc_en: "The Real Eisman Playbook" podcast host and former Neuberger Berman senior portfolio manager said the market environment looks strikingly similar to last year.
items.desc_zh: “The Real Eisman Playbook”播客主持人、前 Neuberger Berman 高级投资组合经理表示，市场环境看起来与去年惊人相似。

items.title_en: Amazon posted a blowout quarter. Why the Street says this is only the start of the stock's strong run
items.title_zh: 亚马逊公布了井喷的季度业绩。为什么华尔街说这只是该股强劲上涨的开始
items.desc_en: "AMZN is adding the most AI capacity of any company over the next few years, and as the coming wave of Agentic AI products take form, all roads lead to AWS," one analyst said.
items.desc_zh: 一位分析师表示：“未来几年，AMZN 将成为所有公司中增加 AI 能力最多的公司，随着即将到来的 Agentic AI 产品浪潮的形成，所有道路都通向 AWS。”

items.title_en: Forget 'Sell in May.' Under Trump, market could be poised for summertime gains
items.title_zh: 忘记“五月出售”。在特朗普的领导下，市场可能会在夏季上涨
items.desc_en: The upcoming six-month period has historically been such a bad stretch for the stock market that Wall Street has an adage for it: “Sell in May and go away.”
items.desc_zh: 从历史上看，接下来的六个月对股市来说是一段糟糕的时期，以至于华尔街有一句格言：“五月卖出，走开”。

items.title_en: Republicans could still win the House in the 2026 midterm election: Scalise
items.title_zh: 斯卡利斯：共和党仍有可能在 2026 年中期选举中赢得众议院
items.desc_en: The election is high stakes and will effectively determine whether Trump enters '27 as a lame duck or maintains a governing majority for the end his presidency.
items.desc_zh: 这次选举事关重大，将有效决定特朗普是否以跛脚鸭的身份进入27届，还是在总统任期结束时保持执政多数。

items.title_en: OpenAI tells ChatGPT models to stop talking about goblins
items.title_zh: OpenAI 告诉 ChatGPT 模型停止谈论妖精
items.desc_en: The AI firm said that unlike previous model bugs, this issue "crept in subtly".
items.desc_zh: 这家人工智能公司表示，与之前的模型错误不同，这个问题“悄然出现”。

items.title_en: Core inflation rate hit 3.2% in March as first-quarter growth disappointed at 2%
items.title_zh: 3 月份核心通胀率达 3.2%，而第一季度增长率仅为 2%，令人失望
items.desc_en: Consumers faced escalating prices in March as the Iran war sent oil soaring and created a new level of challenges for the Fed.
items.desc_zh: 由于伊朗战争导致石油价格飙升，并给美联储带来了新的挑战，消费者在三月份面临着不断上涨的价格。

items.title_en: Gemini sets sights on derivatives expansion after winning key U.S. regulatory approval
items.title_zh: Gemini 在获得美国主要监管机构批准后着眼于衍生品扩张
items.desc_en: Exchanges are leaning into products like event contracts and futures as a way to stabilize revenue that otherwise swings with crypto prices.
items.desc_zh: 交易所正在倾向于使用事件合约和期货等产品来稳定收入，否则收入会随着加密货币价格的波动而波动。

items.title_en: More than 20,000 people are taking Eli Lilly's weight loss pill Foundayo, CEO says
items.title_zh: 首席执行官表示，超过 20,000 人正在服用礼来公司的减肥药 Foundayo
items.desc_en: Eli Lilly's weight loss pill launch has been closely watched after the successful start of Novo Nordisk's Wegovy pill.
items.desc_zh: 继诺和诺德的Wegovy药丸成功上市后，礼来公司的减肥药上市受到密切关注。

items.title_en: 'How are we going to get back home?' Islamist group tightens blockade on Mali capital
items.title_zh: “我们要怎么回家？”伊斯兰组织加强对马里首都的封锁
items.desc_en: The blockade comes days after Mali's defence minister was assassinated in a series of nationwide attacks.
items.desc_zh: 这次封锁发生在马里国防部长在一系列全国性袭击中被暗杀几天后。

items.title_en: Trump said his blockade would cause Iran's oil industry to 'explode' this week. Why that won't happen
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，他的封锁将导致伊朗石油工业本周“爆炸”。为什么那不会发生
items.desc_en: The U.S. and Iran are locked in a standoff that will only break when one side decides it can no longer tolerate the pain. Who will move is unclear.
items.desc_zh: 美国和伊朗陷入僵局，只有当一方决定不再忍受痛苦时，这种僵局才会打破。谁将搬家尚不清楚。

items.title_en: U.S. weighs 'reduction' of troops in Germany as Trump's feud with Berlin deepens
items.title_zh: 随着特朗普与柏林的不和加深，美国考虑“减少”在德国的驻军

items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，美国正在考虑减少驻德美军数量的可能性。

items.title_en: Police say they believe abducted child was murdered as body found in Outback
items.title_zh: 警方表示，他们相信被绑架的儿童是被谋杀的，尸体在内陆地区被发现

items.desc_zh: 这名五岁女孩最后一次出现是在周六，地点是爱丽丝泉附近的一个原住民城镇营地。

items.title_zh: 中国以安全考虑为由禁止在北京销售无人机

items.desc_zh: 无人机用户还需要在飞行前注册其设备并获得许可。

items.desc_en: His remarks come after the German chancellor criticised the US approach to the war in Iran.
items.desc_zh: 在他发表上述言论之前，德国总理批评了美国对伊朗战争的态度。

items.desc_zh: 一份临时报告还表示，犹太节日的治安安排应扩大到其他“高风险”活动。

items.title_en: US singer D4vd bought tools online to dispose of girl's body, prosecutors allege

items.title_en: Democrats vow to fight back after Supreme Court Voting Rights Act ruling
items.title_zh: 最高法院投票权法案裁决后民主党誓言反击
items.desc_en: The Supreme Court's decision on Wednesday to weaken a provision of the Voting Rights Act strikes down a Democrat-held, majority-Black district in Louisiana.
items.desc_zh: 最高法院周三决定削弱《投票权法》的一项条款，这对路易斯安那州一个由民主党控制、黑人占多数的选区造成了打击。

items.desc_zh: 该州是最新一个在全国选区重新划分战争中采取行动的州，这场战争可能会影响控制美国众议院的政党。

items.desc_en: Prosecutors say a 2025 seashell photo posted by the former FBI director was a call for violence against Trump.
items.desc_zh: 检察官称，前联邦调查局局长发布的一张 2025 年贝壳照片是在呼吁对特朗普实施暴力。

items.title_en: The friendlier the AI chatbot the more inaccurate it is, study suggests
items.title_zh: 研究表明，人工智能聊天机器人越友好，它就越不准确
items.desc_en: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".
items.desc_zh: 研究人员发现，将人工智能系统调整为对用户更加热情和友好会导致“准确性权衡”。

items.title_en: Seven lawsuits filed against OpenAI by families of Canada mass-shooting victims
items.title_zh: 加拿大大规模枪击事件受害者家属对 OpenAI 提起七起诉讼
items.desc_en: The lawsuits, filed in California, accuse OpenAI and Sam Altman of negligence and abetting a mass shooting by failing to flag the suspect's ChatGPT activity.
items.desc_zh: 这些诉讼在加利福尼亚州提起，指控 OpenAI 和 Sam Altman 疏忽大意，未能标记嫌疑人的 ChatGPT 活动，从而煽动大规模枪击事件。

items.title_en: Social media restrictions for under-16s even if no ban, minister says
items.title_zh: 部长表示，即使没有禁令，对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体也有限制
items.desc_en: The government is consulting on changes as a new social media law goes through its final Parliamentary stages.
items.desc_zh: 随着新的社交媒体法进入议会最后阶段，政府正在就修改进行咨询。

items.title_en: Musk v Altman: Why the tech billionaires and former friends are now facing off in court
items.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼：为什么科技亿万富翁和前朋友现在在法庭上对峙
items.desc_en: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能巨头之间的战斗主要在社交媒体上展开。现在它来到了法庭。

items.title_en: Valve's £85 Steam Controller divides gamers ahead of May launch
items.title_zh: Valve 售价 85 英镑的 Steam 控制器在 5 月发布前吸引了玩家
items.desc_en: The pad will be compatible with PCs, Valve's handheld console, the Steam Deck as well as its upcoming gaming PC.
items.desc_zh: 该垫将与 PC、Valve 的手持控制台、Steam Deck 以及即将推出的游戏 PC 兼容。

items.desc_zh: 在此之前，中国监管机构对与 Facebook 所有者达成的交易进行了数月的审查。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板对没有告诉警方大规模枪击嫌疑人的账户深感抱歉

items.desc_zh: 周四，山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 在一月份发生大规模枪击事件后，向加拿大塔布勒岭 (Tumbler Ridge) 的人民写了一封简短的道歉信。
